integrity.description: The agent used the TimeTrex web GUI to create the stations.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the expected values into a text editor or note-taking app.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs are entered into the actual TimeTrex Station configuration form fields.

integrity.description: The agent actually saved the records in the application.
